title: Hover Items
description: Clean pop-out hover animation for Items and a toggleable bounce animation option.
body:
**Hover Items**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Adds a little animation when hovering over items Settings accessible with mod menu, the default settings were the settings I personally liked Should work in every container like chests skulkers inventory ect ---
**What the default settings look like** ![Default settings look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mPPc1NjY/images/34f9bca9b61f3b27ff52f16644c4a43e9c2b9eff.gif)
--- The mod is only an animation, so don't worry about added delay or anything, it works instantly when picking it up dragging hotkeying ect nothing of that sort is touched its purely an animation thats visual. have any questions? need help? want to report a bug? Request a something added to the mod? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
